pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the family lifestyle and wellbeing blog with quick access to key sections and surfaced featured content.
primary_functions: Provide quick navigation to Recipes, Activities, Articles, Shop, Planner, and Tools sections
Show featured content such as popular recipes, recent wellbeing articles, and highlighted activities
Expose a global search bar/icon to start content searches from any page
Provide access to newsletter preferences via a footer link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Recipes' in header nav or featured recipes section
Click on 'Activities' in header nav or highlighted activities section
Submit global search form from header
Click on 'Shop' in header nav or featured product teaser
Click on 'Planner' in header or homepage planner promo
Click on 'Tools' in header or tools promo block
Click 'Newsletter Preferences' in footer

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' link in the main header navigation
Primary landing page at index.html

pages.name: Recipes
pages.description: Browse and filter family recipes for different meals, health goals, and time constraints.
primary_functions: Filter recipes by meal type (e.g., Dinner, Snacks), cook/prep time, calories per serving, rating, and servings
Sort recipe results (e.g., by rating high to low, newest, quickest)
Display recipe cards with key details (title, image, cook time, calories, rating, servings)
Open individual recipes in the Recipe Detail page from the results list

incoming_params.description: Preselected meal type filter (e.g., 'dinner', 'snacks')
Maximum cook time filter in minutes, e.g., 45
Maximum calories per serving filter, e.g., 600
Minimum recipe rating filter, e.g., 4
Target number of servings, e.g., 4
Optional health tag filter, e.g., 'low_sugar'
Sort order for results, e.g., 'rating_desc'
Pagination index for recipe results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a recipe card in the results grid/list
Click 'Add to Planner' call-to-action if provided in context

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Recipes' link in the main header navigation
Filters and sorting can be deep-linked via query parameters

pages.name: Recipe Detail
pages.description: Show full details for a single recipe and allow saving to collections or plans.
primary_functions: Display complete recipe information including ingredients, steps, nutrition, cook time, and servings
Allow saving the recipe into a named collection (e.g., create or choose 'Weeknight Dinners')
Provide an option to add the recipe to a plan in the Planner for a selected day
Show related recipes to encourage further exploration

incoming_params.description: ID of the recipe to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Use browser back button or 'Back to recipes' link after viewing a recipe
Click 'View collection' after saving recipe to a collection
Click 'Add to Planner' button and confirm a target plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via recipe_detail.html?id={recipeId}
Linked from recipe cards, collections, and planner schedule items

pages.name: Activities
pages.description: Browse and filter family activities by age, location, cost, and duration.
primary_functions: Filter activities by age group (e.g., 36 years, 58 years, 912 years), location (Indoors/Outdoors), cost, and duration
Display activity cards with age range, location, cost, and estimated duration
Open individual activities in the Activity Detail page from the results list
Support scanning and selecting multiple activities to add to lists or plans via their detail pages

incoming_params.description: Preselected age group filter, e.g., 'years_5_8'
Preselected location filter, e.g., 'indoors' or 'outdoors'
Cost filter, e.g., 'free'
Maximum duration in minutes, e.g., 60 or 120
Sort order for activity results
Pagination index for activity results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an activity card in the results list
Click 'Add to Planner' call-to-action if provided in context

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Activities' link in the main header navigation
Filters and sorting can be controlled via query parameters

pages.name: Activity Detail
pages.description: Show full instructions and details for a single activity and allow adding to lists or plans.
primary_functions: Display complete activity information including materials, instructions, age suitability, and duration
Allow adding the activity to a named list (e.g., create or choose 'Rainy Day Plan')
Provide an option to add the activity directly to a Planner schedule for a chosen day
Show related activities matching similar age group or location

incoming_params.description: ID of the activity to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Use browser back button or 'Back to activities' link after viewing an activity
Click 'View list' after adding activity to a list
Click 'Add to Planner' button and choose target plan/day

access_methods.description: Accessed via activity_detail.html?id={activityId}
Linked from activity cards, activity lists, and planner schedule items

pages.name: Search & Articles
pages.description: Search across articles and content, then refine results with category and other filters.
primary_functions: Run keyword searches across articles and relevant content (e.g., 'family mindfulness routine', 'screen time rules')
Filter search results by category (e.g., Wellbeing, Parenting), tags/level (e.g., Beginner), publish date range, age range, and session length where applicable
Display result cards showing article title, summary, category, comment count, and any relevant metadata (e.g., session length)
Open selected articles in the Article Detail page for reading, bookmarking, and commenting

incoming_params.description: Search keyword string entered via global search bar, e.g., 'family mindfulness routine'
Article category filter, e.g., 'wellbeing' or 'parenting'
Article difficulty/level filter, e.g., 'beginner'
Target age group filter, e.g., 'years_9_12'
Start of publish date range filter in ISO format
End of publish date range filter in ISO format
Minimum session length filter for routine-style content
Maximum session length filter, e.g., 15
Minimum number of comments filter, e.g., 10
Sort order for search results, e.g., 'relevance' or 'newest'
Pagination index for article search results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title/card in the search results

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Articles' link in the main header navigation
Global header search submits to search.html with query parameters
Search query and filters provided via query string parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Present full article content with options to bookmark and comment.
primary_functions: Display full article content including title, author, publish date, category, and tags
Show a bookmark or Save control to add the article to a reading list (e.g., 'Add to Reading List')
Display comment count and existing comments, including the count badge used in search results
Provide a comment form where the user can enter a name and a text comment and submit it (e.g., to post a two-sentence comment with 'family agreement')

incoming_params.description: ID of the article to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Use browser back button or 'Back to Articles' link after reading
Click 'View Reading List' after bookmarking an article

access_methods.description: Accessed via article_detail.html?id={articleId}
Linked from search results, featured articles, and saved reading lists

pages.name: Shop
pages.description: Browse family-related products and filter by category, price, and rating.
primary_functions: Show product categories such as 'Fitness & Yoga' and allow navigating into a selected category
Provide a category-level search field (e.g., for 'family yoga mat') within the selected category
Filter products by attributes such as price (with maximum price), rating thresholds, and other relevant options
Display product cards and open selected products in the Product Detail page

incoming_params.description: Preselected product category key, e.g., 'fitness_and_yoga'
In-category product search term, e.g., 'family yoga mat'
Maximum product price filter, e.g., 60
Minimum product rating filter, e.g., 4.5
Sort order for products, e.g., 'rating_desc' or 'price_asc'
Pagination index for product results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card in the list/grid

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Shop' link in the main header navigation
Category, filters, and query configured via URL parameters

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Display detailed product information and allow adding products to custom lists.
primary_functions: Show full product details including images, price, rating, description, and key features
Allow opening multiple product pages in separate tabs/windows for comparison (e.g., two yoga mats under $60)
Enable adding the product to a named list (e.g., choose or create 'Home Gym')
Present related or recommended products within the same category

incoming_params.description: ID of the product to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Shop' or browser back button after viewing a product
Click 'View list' after adding a product to a list

access_methods.description: Accessed via product_detail.html?id={productId}
Linked from shop results and saved product lists

pages.name: Planner
pages.description: Create and manage family plans, schedules, and weekend activity/meal combinations.
primary_functions: Create new named plans (e.g., 'Weekend Fun') and open an existing plan for editing
Provide an Activities tab within the plan where users can filter activities by age group, location, and duration, then add selected activities to specific days
Provide a Recipes tab within the plan where users can filter snack or meal recipes by type, prep time, and healthiness, then assign selected recipes to specific days
Show a schedule view or summary of the current plan, listing all activities and recipes by day (e.g., overview of 'Weekend Fun')

incoming_params.description: ID of the planner plan to open directly
Optional view mode, e.g., 'edit' or 'schedule'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Browse more activities' from Activities tab
Click 'Browse more recipes' from Recipes tab
Click an activity title within a plan
Click a recipe title within a plan

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Planner' link in the main header navigation
Accessible via 'Planner' quick link in the footer
Specific plans opened via planner.html?planId={planId}

pages.name: Tools
pages.description: Hub page listing planning and budgeting tools available on the site.
primary_functions: List available tools such as the Wellness Budget Planner with brief descriptions
Allow navigation into specific tools (e.g., open the Wellness Budget Planner page)
Highlight recommended tools for new users based on typical family wellbeing needs

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Wellness Budget Planner' tool card

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tools' link in the main header navigation
Deep links from articles can point directly to tools.html

pages.name: Wellness Budget Planner
pages.description: Dedicated tool for setting and saving a monthly wellness budget across categories.
primary_functions: Accept a total monthly wellness budget amount (e.g., 200)
Allow adding and naming budget categories (e.g., 'Healthy Groceries', 'Family Activities', 'Subscriptions') and assigning amounts to each
Provide a month selector to choose the month the budget applies to (e.g., upcoming month)
Save the configured monthly budget so the user can revisit and adjust it later

incoming_params.description: Target month key for the budget, e.g., 'april'
Target year for the selected monthly budget

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Tools' from the budget planner

access_methods.description: Accessed from Tools page via 'Wellness Budget Planner' card
Specific month/year budget opened via query parameters

pages.name: Newsletter Preferences
pages.description: Manage subscription topics and delivery preferences for the email newsletter.
primary_functions: Allow selecting specific newsletter topics via checkboxes (e.g., 'Healthy Recipes', 'Parenting Tips', 'Mindfulness & Self-Care')
Set delivery frequency (e.g., Weekly), preferred day of the week (e.g., Monday), and time of day (e.g., 8:00 AM)
Accept and display the email address to send the newsletter to (e.g., family_tester@example.com)
Save the newsletter preferences so they apply to future email deliveries

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' or site logo after saving preferences

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Newsletter Preferences' link in the footer
Direct URL access to manage newsletter settings

pages.name: Saved Lists & Collections
pages.description: Central place to view and manage all saved recipe collections, activity lists, product lists, and reading lists.
primary_functions: Display existing lists and collections such as 'Weeknight Dinners', 'Rainy Day Plan', 'Home Gym', and 'Reading List'
Allow renaming or deleting lists and removing individual items from a list
Provide controls to create new custom lists or collections directly from this page
Link from items back to their detail pages (recipes, activities, products, or articles) for further action

incoming_params.description: Type of list to focus, e.g., 'recipe_collection', 'activity_list', 'product_list', or 'reading_list'
Specific list/collection ID to open by default

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a recipe item within a recipe collection
Click on an activity item within an activity list
Click on a product item within a product list
Click on an article item within a reading list

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Saved Lists' link in the main header navigation
Focused list type and ID can be passed via query parameters

pages.name: About
pages.description: Introduce the mission and background of the family lifestyle and wellbeing blog.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose, values, and focus areas of the site (family lifestyle, wellbeing, and practical planning)
Introduce the editorial or content approach so users understand what to expect
Provide context for how recipes, activities, tools, and articles are curated

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us' link from About page content

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' link in the footer
Static page accessible directly via about.html

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Provide contact details and a simple way for users to get in touch.
primary_functions: Display contact information such as email address or contact instructions
Provide a basic contact form for feedback, questions, or suggestions
Indicate expected response time or how user feedback is used to improve the site

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' or site logo after submitting or viewing contact page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' link in the footer
Contact form submission handled within this page

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Explain how user data and preferences are handled and protected.
primary_functions: Describe what information is collected when users browse, save items, or set preferences
Explain how newsletter preferences and planner data are stored and used
Clarify data retention, third-party services (if any), and user privacy rights

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer
Static policy page at privacy.html

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Outline the conditions under which the user may use the site and its content.
primary_functions: Explain permitted use of site content such as recipes, articles, and activity ideas
Describe limitations of liability and disclaimers related to wellbeing and lifestyle advice
Clarify intellectual property rights and rules for user-generated content such as comments

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Terms of Use' link in the footer
Static terms page at terms.html

header_links.description: Homepage with featured content and entry points to all sections
Explore and search wellbeing and parenting articles
Create and manage family plans and schedules
View and manage saved collections and lists

footer_links.description: Learn more about this family lifestyle and wellbeing blog
Get in touch with questions or feedback
Manage email topics and delivery settings
Quick link to the family planner tool
Read how your data and privacy are handled
Review the terms and conditions for using the site
